recentArticles.title: Kes Teases New Album; Talks Tiny Desk Debut & Hopping On Di Genius’ ‘Hill & Gully’ Riddim: ‘Nobody Expected That!’ - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Kes Teases New Album; Talks Tiny Desk Debut & Hopping On Di Genius’ ‘Hill & Gully’ Riddim: ‘Nobody Expected That!’. The Kes the Band frontman checks in with *Billboard* at the 2026 Saint Lucia Jazz & Arts Festival. There were still two more days of this year’s Saint Lucia Jazz & Arts Festival following Kes the Band’s terrific Friday night headlining set (May 8) — and the soca group cleared all the competition. Fronted by Kees Dieffenthaller, who also goes by Kes, the band delivered an hour of high-energy renditions of contemporary soca bangers like “Wotless,” “Savannah Grass” and “Cocoa Tea.” The festival stop is just the latest in a string of hectic periods for the band — including a pair of Jazz @ Lincoln Center shows in January and the forthcoming North American leg of its Roots, Rock, Soca Tour. “When I was coming down on the plane, I had the chance to have a one-on-one with Billy Ocean, who’s also from Trinidad.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於Kes the Band的新專輯和演出活動，內容中並未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: All of Chris Brown’s Solo Albums Ranked From Worst to Best: Critics’ Picks - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # All of Chris Brown’s Solo Albums Ranked From Worst to Best: Critics’ Picks. Despite receiving mixed reviews online — including a response from the singer himself — the Virginia native remains in a favorable position as one of R&B’s lead anchors and enduring pillars of continuity. For over two decades, Brown has carved out a lane that now allows him to headline stadium tours — including his upcoming jaunt with Usher — while still hoisting a fistful of Top 40 bangers like “With You,” “Yo (Excuse Me Miss)” and “No Guidance.”. Brown’s last studio album, 2023’s *11:11*, earned him his second Grammy at the 2025 ceremony and spawned a top 40 Billboard Hot 100 hit with “Residuals,” proving he can still carve out classic records and memorable moments when the occasion calls for it. As the follow-up to the massively successful *Exclusive*, the album had a different kind of pressure around it, but it still debuted at No. 7 on the Billboard 200, giving him his third consecutive top-10 album in the United States.

recentArticles.title: Watch Blue Ivy, 14, ignore dad Jay Z’s one repeated request on Met Gala red carpet - Page Six
recentArticles.snippet: # Watch Blue Ivy, 14, ignore dad Jay Z’s one repeated request on Met Gala red carpet. Blue Ivy’s Met Gala debut didn’t go off quite as smoothly as it appeared, as dad Jay-Z seemingly pleaded with her to remove her sunglasses on the red carpet. In a clip obtained by the Daily Mail, the 14-year-old daughter of Beyoncé and Jay-Z modeled her billowy cream Balenciaga dress and matching bomber jacket alongside her mother as they made their way up the famous Met Gala staircase. The publicist turned to ask Beyoncé to instruct the teen to remove the shades, and stylist Ty Hunter got involved as well before a tuxedo-clad Jay-Z made the same request. Blue Ivy was seemingly unmoved, ignoring the instructions and leaving the sunglasses in place as cameras flashed around her. “It feels surreal [to be back] because my daughter’s here,” Beyoncé told Vogue at the event, acknowledging her 10-year absence from the Met Gala.

Gillis kicked off the evening in Inglewood by thanking Netflix for “choosing me to host this celebration of Black excellence” before Usher, backed by The Roots, introduced the show with a performance of “Caught Up,” eventually transitioning to a musical roast of Hart. “You’re like Martha Stewart but without the respect of the Black community,” he said, before launching into a hilarious recollection about how Hart’s remarks at the Brady roast spurred him to get a colonoscopy screening, detect his cancer and be able to make it to tonight’s event to “shit all over you.”.

recentArticles.title: Sony Publishing to Acquire Recognition: Fleetwood Mac, Beyonce Songs - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: # Sony Publishing to Acquire Recognition Music in Billion-Plus Dollar Deal, Including Songs by Fleetwood Mac, Beyonce, Lady Gaga. As expected, Sony Music Publishing has announced an agreement to acquire the complete music rights portfolio of Recognition Music Group from funds managed by Blackstone, subject to customary closing conditions. The deal will see Sony Music Publishing acquiring Recognition’s entire catalog of works, which includes shares in more than 45,000 songs, among them Journey’s “Don’t Stop Believin’,” Red Hot Chili Peppers’ “Under the Bridge,” Fleetwood Mac’s “Go Your Own Way,” Beyoncé’s “Single Ladies (Put A Ring On It),” Bruno Mars’ “Locked Out of Heaven,” Leonard Cohen’s “Hallelujah,” Chic’s “Good Times,” Soundgarden’s “Black Hole Sun,” Lady Gaga’s “Bad Romance,” Bon Jovi’s “Livin’ On A Prayer,” Rihanna’s “Umbrella,” Eurythmics’ “Sweet Dreams (Are Made Of This),” Shakira’s “Whenever, Wherever,” Steve Winwood’s “Higher Love” and Mariah Carey’s “All I Want For Christmas Is You,” among many others.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導Sony Music Publishing收購Recognition Music Group的音樂版權，其中包含多位西方知名藝人的歌曲，但未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: A Thriller of a Biopic - M-A Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: Directed by Antoine Fuqua, the movie aims to humanize the experiences of Michael Jackson by showcasing his experiences as a child in the 1960’s all the way up until his “Bad” Tour in 1987-89. The film stars Jaafar Jackson, Michael Jackson’s real-life nephew, as Michael. Joseph Jackson (Colman Domingo), Michael’s father, is the film’s main antagonist, as his physical abuse and desire to push his sons to musical stardom overshadows the well-being of his family members. Though clearly there are still major flaws with the film’s portrayal of the Jackson family, as Janet Jackson, Michael’s famous sister, refused to sign off to be played in the film. The film’s musical moments were created by blending Michael Jackson’s original recordings with live, on-set vocals from his nephew, Jaafar Jackson, and Juliano Valdi, who plays the young Michael. Along with Michael Jackson’s once-in-a-generation vocals, he’s also incredibly famous for his iconic dancing, which Jaafar Jackson and Valdi both emulated flawlessly throughout the film.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導詳細介紹了關於麥可傑克森傳記電影的製作細節，包括導演、演員、劇情內容以及音樂和舞蹈的呈現方式，但與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.snippet: © 2026 Pedestrian Group Pty Ltd. PEDESTRIAN.TV Entertainment KJ Apa Goes Nuclear On His All-But-Confirmed Alter Ego Mr. Fantasy: ‘F\*\*king Liar & Thief’. # KJ Apa Goes Nuclear On His All-But-Confirmed Alter Ego Mr. Fantasy: ‘F\*\*king Liar & Thief’. *Riverdale* star **KJ Apa** has scolded what is highly likely to be his musical alter ego **Mr. Fantasy**, calling him a “liar and thief” after KJ’s co-stars appeared in his new music video. KJ, who is all-but confirmed to be the man behind Mr. Fantasy’s wig and fake teeth, took to Instagram today after the release of the singer’s music video for “Do Me Right”, which featured *Riverdale* stars **Lili Reinhart**, **Camila Mendes**, and **Madelaine Petsch**. KJ went on to accuse Mr. Fantasy — who has been linked to him ever since popping up on TikTok in mid-2025 — of “hurting me and my career”, claiming the viral sensation had “lost me a huge job” and prevented him from getting “serious work because people think that I’m a joke because of this guy”.

recentArticles.title: Justin Bieber Returns to No.1 as Most Listened-to Artist on Spotify - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: # Justin Bieber Returns to No.1 as  Most Listened-to Artist on Spotify. It marks his return to the top spot since 2021, when he reached a record-breaking 83 million listeners. Justin Bieber is the most listened-to artist on Spotify. This marks Bieber’s return to the top spot in nearly five years, when he hit 83 million monthly listeners back in 2021. The record coincided with the release of The Kid LAROI and Bieber’s hit “Stay,” which spent 12 weeks at No. 1 on the Billboard Canadian Hot 100 — the latter’s second-longest song at the top. In January, he scored his newest entry in Spotify’s Billions Club with the Chance the Rapper-featuring “Confident,” from 2013’s **Journals**, which recently landed on the Billboard Canadian Albums chart for the first time, hitting No. 96. On the charts, multiple of his songs and albums re-entered the Canadian Hot 100 and the Canadian Albums rankings after his headlining sets at the music festival.

recentArticles.title: MUSIC AWARDS JAPAN 2026 Full Nominee List Revealed - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: At the nomination announcement event in Tokyo on April 30, this year's MAJ Ambassadors, Kento Nakajima & Mei Hata, took the stage. MUSIC AWARDS JAPAN 2026, Japan’s biggest international music awards show, has unveiled its nominees across 63 categories ahead of the June 13 ceremony. MUSIC AWARDS JAPAN (MAJ) is built around the concept of “Connecting with the world, illuminating the future of music.” Now in its second year, this year’s ceremony spans 77 categories across genres and national borders. In the six major categories — Song of the Year (100 songs), Artist of the Year (100 artists), Album of the Year (100 albums), New Artist of the Year (50 artists), Best Global Hit from Japan (100 songs), and Best Song Asia (21 songs) — five nominees were selected from each category’s entry pool. At the nomination announcement event held in Tokyo on April 30, this year’s MAJ Ambassadors, Kento Nakajima and Mei Hata, took to the stage.

recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Jackson biopic revives legend of Jewish music mogul who battled MTV’s ‘color barrier’. ## Walter Yetnikoff was one of the music industry’s most colorful figures, shepherding artists such as Billy Joel, Bruce Springsteen and Gloria Estefan, in addition to Michael Jackson. Walter Yetnikoff, president of CBS records, and Michael Jackson celebrate at the Guinness Book of World Records party honoring Michael Jackson for the top selling solo album in history at the Museum of Natural History on Feb 8, 1984. About halfway through *Michael*, the new blockbuster biopic of Michael Jackson, there is a scene in which Jackson (played by his nephew Jafaar) and his lawyer, John Branca (Miles Teller), are sitting with the president of his record label. Jackson retorts that he is a “proud Black artist” who makes his music for everyone, and that he “won’t be shoved to the back of any bus by MTV or anyone.”.

recentArticles.title: Jack Johnson Announces AU/NZ Dates With Ben Harper and John Butler - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Jack Johnson Announces AU/NZ Dates With Ben Harper and John Butler. The announcement ties into Johnson's upcoming *SURFILMUSIC* project. Jack Johnson will return to Australia and New Zealand later this year, announcing a run of November dates for his SURFILMUSIC tour, joined by Ben Harper and John Butler. ### Jack Johnson. ### Jack Johnson **SURFILMUSIC** AU/NZ Tour Dates. The tour marks Johnson’s first shows in the region since 2022 and brings together three artists whose catalogs span folk, blues, roots and surf-inspired rock, with Harper and Butler both set to perform solo acoustic sets across the run. The announcement ties into Johnson’s upcoming *SURFILMUSIC* project, a soundtrack release arriving May 15 that pairs his music with a new documentary tracing his early career — from his beginnings as a competitive surfer on Oahu’s North Shore to his transition into filmmaking and music.

recentArticles.title: Robert Glasper and Scarface to headline Emancipation Park Juneteenth event - Houston Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: # Houstonians Robert Glasper and Scarface to headline Emancipation Park Juneteenth event. A couple of Houston musical legends, jazz keyboardist Robert Glasper and hip-hop pioneer Scarface, are headlining this year's free Juneteenth celebration, dubbed Juneteenth: The Reunion, on June 19 at Emancipation Park in Third Ward, it was announced Thursday by the Emanicipation Park Conservancy. This event will mark the debut of the park's new, state-of-the-art stage that was funded by the Kinder Foundation. “This year’s Juneteenth celebration represents both a continuation of tradition and an investment in the future,” said Corey Wilson, president and CEO, Emancipation Park Conservancy, in a statement. “From a world-class lineup of artists to the inaugural performances on our new state-of-the-art stage, we are building on Emancipation Park’s historic legacy while expanding what’s possible for cultural programming and community gathering in this space.”. “Kinder Foundation is proud to support Emancipation Park as a historic and cultural cornerstone for Houston. Cary Darling is the arts and entertainment editor for the Houston Chronicle.

Other new singles that came out this week are “Big Dog” by The Last Dinner Party, “Sell My Soul” by PJ Morton and “Lines in the Carpet” by Ashley McBryde, as well as “Dancing on the Wall” by Kelela, “Cada Vez Me Gusta Más” by Grupo Frontera x Alejandro Fernández, “Holding On to Lonely” by Waylon Payne and “I Need U” by TSHA, HoneyLuv and Ellie Maxwell. But some of the biggest releases of the beginning of May are the full-lengths released by acts such as MUNA — who returned with new album *Dancing on the Wall* — and J Balvin and Ryan Castro, who joined forces on *Omerta*.

recentArticles.title: Noah Kahan gets a No. 1 album at last, while Michael Jackson reenters the top 10 - WUKY
recentArticles.snippet: # Noah Kahan gets a No. 1 album at last, while Michael Jackson reenters the top 10. Noah Kahan's coronation as an A-list superstar is complete, as *The Great Divide* debuts atop the *Billboard* 200 albums chart — and all of its songs land on this week's Hot 100. That record has sat on the *Billboard* 200 albums chart for more than three years — and in 2024, its title track became his first top 10 hit. But it's never taken him all the way to the top of the albums chart, until now. Consider this: On the day of *The Great Divide*'s release, Kahan's label dropped a deluxe edition (*The Great Divide: The Last of the Bugs*) on streaming services, expanding the album from 17 songs to 21. If you dream of one day landing a top 10 hit on the *Billboard* Hot 100, consider this pro tip: It's a great time to be named either Ella or Olivia.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞主要報導Noah Kahan的專輯首次登上告示牌200強榜首，以及麥可傑克森重回前十名，內容未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Who is Machine Gun Kelly, the performer blending rap and rock? - Numéro
recentArticles.snippet: # Who is Machine Gun Kelly, the performer blending rap and rock? Virtually unknown in France, Machine Gun Kelly is a huge hit in the United States. The daring rocker and rapper has just become engaged to actress Megan Fox, walked the runway for Dolce & Gabbana and launched his own brand of genderless nail polish. Portrait of an artist who embodies the rise of a very noughties pop-punk aesthetic. **Machine Gun Kelly** is one of those artists who are first and foremost a phenomenon in their home country. In France, his name often comes up in the news as the new fiancé of American actress and model **Megan Fox**. The duo is reminiscent of **Angelina Jolie** and **Billy Bob Thornton** in the 2000s, or of **Pamela Anderson**‘s and **Tommy Lee**‘s wild romance. In 2018, he created a buzz by writing a diss track in response to **Eminem**’s insults. Machine Gun Kelly is also known for his acting skills.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇報導主要介紹了美國藝人Machine Gun Kelly的音樂風格、與Megan Fox的戀情、時尚活動以及他與Eminem的爭議，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Billie Eilish 'Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour' Film: Inside LA Premiere - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Inside Billie Eilish’s ‘Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour’ L.A. Premiere: From Her Red-Carpet Debut With Nat Wolff to Moviegoers Creating Their Own Pit. The 3-D concert film hits theaters on Friday. Billie Eilish premiered her concert film *Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D)* on Wednesday night (May 6) at L.A.’s Fox Westwood Theater, hitting the red carpet with co-director James Cameron, her parents and her brother Finneas. *Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D)* is Eilish’s third concert film and first with fellow Oscar winner Cameron. The concert film brings fans the experience of seeing Eilish on her epic arena tour in support of her 2024 album *Hit Me Hard and Soft* as well as behind-the-scenes looks at the setup for the show. *Hit Me Hard and Soft*: *The Tour (Live in 3D)* ends with Eilish in her happy place: with puppies.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導了Billie Eilish的演唱會電影《Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour》在洛杉磯的首映會，內容主要聚焦於電影本身及其製作細節，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Brice goes the Mixtape route - Country Standard Time
recentArticles.snippet: **Friday, May 1, 2026** – Lee Brice released his latest summertime love anthem, "Truck Bed Mixtape," out now. "Truck Bed Mixtape" will be featured on Brice's forthcoming album," Sunriser," and its deluxe edition, "Sunriser (All Nighter).," coming in October. ### More news for Lee Brice. * 04/22/26: Brice plans "Truck Bed Mixtape," delays record release, but adds deluxe version. * 02/20/26: Brice is "Country Nowadays," announces new record. * 07/03/25: Brice releases "Said No Country Boy Ever" with friends. ### CD reviews for Lee Brice. The cover of "I Don't Dance" features a glam shot of Lee Brice standing in a spotlight, looking more like a pop artist than a country singer. The success of his sophomore release emboldened Lee Brice. Lee Brice had a dream run of success with his debut, "Love Like Crazy" - the title track became the most-played song on country radio in 2010. ©Country Standard Time • Jeffrey B. About • Copyright • Newsletter • Our sister publication Standard Time.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導主要關於美國鄉村歌手Lee Brice的新歌發行與專輯計畫，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson Shatters His Best Streaming Week Total After Biopic Release, as Catalog Floods Charts - billboard.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Jackson Shatters His Best Streaming Week Total After Biopic Release, as Catalog Floods Charts. The late icon more than doubles his previous best total, as *Thriller* and "Billie Jean" lead his albums and songs' returns. Confirming projections reported in late April, Michael Jackson obliterates his personal-best domestic streaming week following the release of the *Michael* biopic. The King of Pop’s solo song catalog registered a collective 137.5 million official on-demand streams for the week of April 24-30 in the United States, according to Luminate, up 146% and more than doubling his previous career high. ### Michael Jackson’s Top 50 Hit Songs on the Billboard Hot 100. Before his nine-digit streaming haul, Jackson’s solo catalog achieved a new personal benchmark last week at 55.9 million song clicks. *Thriller* classic “Billie Jean” leads the song recap, as it repeats its usual standing as the catalog’s most streamed song (9.4 million) and returns to the Billboard Hot 100 at No. 38.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於麥可傑克森因傳記電影上映而創下串流新高，內容與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson Shatters His Best Streaming Week Total After Biopic Release, as Catalogue Floods Charts - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: The late icon more than doubles his previous best total, as *Thriller* and "Billie Jean" lead his albums and songs' returns. Confirming projections reported in late April, Michael Jackson obliterates his personal-best domestic streaming week following the release of the *Michael* biopic. The King of Pop’s solo song catalogue registered a collective 137.5 million official on-demand streams for the week of April 24-30 in the United States, according to Luminate, up 146% and more than doubling his previous career high. Prior to the *Michael* era, the late icon, who died in 2009, recorded a high of 53.7 million for the week of Oct. 25-31, 2019, spurred by the now-annual Halloween resurgence for “Thriller.”. *Michael* covers Jackson’s life from 1966 to 1988, including time with both The Jackson 5 and The Jacksons groups with his brothers. *Thriller* classic “Billie Jean” leads the song recap, as it repeats its usual standing as the catalogue’s most streamed song (9.4 million) and returns to the Billboard Hot 100 at No. 38.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇報導指出，麥可·傑克森的傳記電影上映後，其歌曲串流播放量大幅飆升，創下個人新高。
